zh.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn是Levon ap Einion的兒子，出生。他和Mary至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn是Levon ap Einion的儿子，出生。他和Mary至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn was born as the son of Levon ap Einion. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary.

fr.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn est né, fils de Levon ap Einion. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mary.

de.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn wurde, als Sohn von Levon ap Einion geboren. Er hatte mit Mary mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn è nato il come figlio di Levon ap Einion. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mary.

ja.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap LlewelynはLevon ap Einionの息子として生まれた。彼はMaryとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn(은)는 Levon ap Einion의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mary(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn nasceu filho de Levon ap Einion. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mary.

ru.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn родился. Его отца звали Levon ap Einion. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mary.

es.lifeSummary: Tegwered ap Llewelyn nació como hijo de Levon ap Einion. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mary.
